title: Replace phone number in header with +91 9700104108

requirements.summary: Update the phone number displayed in the Header component's top bar to '+91 9700104108'
acceptanceCriteria: The header top bar displays '+91 9700104108' as the phone number.
No other header content or styling is changed.
The change is visible on all pages that use the shared Header component.

file_operations.description: In the Header component, locate the <strong> element inside the top bar's phone/contact span (within the first span element of the top bar) and replace its text content from the current phone number to '+91 9700104108'. This change updates the displayed contact phone number visible in the header across all application pages without modifying any other styling, layout, or content.
